name: Take the Stage

abilities.name: Dress Rehearsal
abilities.text: When this model resolves the Interact action while it is on the enemy table half, it gains a Backtrack token.

actions.name: Showstopper
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly Scheme or Decoy marker only.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target. Then this model may declare the Interact action. The following do not restrict this model from declaring this Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

extraction_notes: The Showstopper action has an unusual icon (✝) before the '@' symbol for Showstopper which appears to be a Signature action marker based on context
